title: Crispy Turkey Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with crispy turkey, crunchy vegetables, and savory sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the turkey breast pieces to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the chopped lettuce and stir-fry sauce to the skillet and cook until the lettuce is wilted, about 2 minutes.
Stir in the Russian dressing and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
